controls.title: Policies for information security
controls.objective: Information security policy and topic-specific policies should be defined, approved by management, published, communicated to and acknowledged by relevant personnel and relevant interested parties, and reviewed at planned intervals and if significant changes occur.
controls.description: Information security policy and topic-specific policies should be defined, approved by management, published, communicated to and acknowledged by relevant personnel and relevant interested parties, and reviewed at planned intervals and if significant changes occur.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review policies for information security at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that policies for information security is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Information security roles and responsibilities
controls.objective: Information security roles and responsibilities should be defined and allocated according to the organization needs
controls.description: Information security roles and responsibilities should be defined and allocated according to the organization needs
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information security roles and responsibilities at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Information security roles and responsibilities evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information security roles and responsibilities is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Segregation of duties
controls.objective: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility should be segregated.
controls.description: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility should be segregated.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review segregation of duties at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that segregation of duties is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Management Responsibilities
controls.objective: Management should require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with the established information security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures of the organization.
controls.description: Management should require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with the established information security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures of the organization.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review management responsibilities at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that management responsibilities is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Contact with Authorities
controls.objective: The organization should establish and maintain contact with relevant authorities.

controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review contact with authorities at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that contact with authorities is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Contact with special interest groups
controls.objective: The organization should establish and maintain contact with special interest groups or other specialist security forums and professional associations.
controls.description: The organization should establish and maintain contact with special interest groups or other specialist security forums and professional associations.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review contact with special interest groups at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Contact with special interest groups evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that contact with special interest groups is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Threat intelligence
controls.objective: Information relating to information security threats should be collected and analysed to produce threat intelligence.
controls.description: Information relating to information security threats should be collected and analysed to produce threat intelligence.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review threat intelligence at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that threat intelligence is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Information security in project management
controls.objective: Information security should be integrated into project management.
controls.description: Information security should be integrated into project management.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information security in project management at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Information security in project management evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information security in project management is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.objective: An inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners, should be developed and maintained.
controls.description: An inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners, should be developed and maintained.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review inventory of information and other associated assets at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Inventory of information and other associated assets evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that inventory of information and other associated assets is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.objective: Rules for the acceptable use and procedures for handling information and other associated assets should be identified, documented and implemented.
controls.description: Rules for the acceptable use and procedures for handling information and other associated assets should be identified, documented and implemented.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review acceptable use of information and other associated assets at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that acceptable use of information and other associated assets is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Return of Assets
controls.objective: Personnel and other interested parties as appropriate should return all the organization’s assets in their possession upon change or termination of their employment, contract or agreement.
controls.description: Personnel and other interested parties as appropriate should return all the organization’s assets in their possession upon change or termination of their employment, contract or agreement.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review return of assets at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that return of assets is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Classification Of Information
controls.objective: Information should be classified according to the information security needs of the organization based on confidentiality, integrity, availability and relevant interested party requirements.
controls.description: Information should be classified according to the information security needs of the organization based on confidentiality, integrity, availability and relevant interested party requirements.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review classification of information at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that classification of information is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Labelling of Information
controls.objective: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling should be developed and implemented in accordance with the information classification scheme adopted by the organization.
controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling should be developed and implemented in accordance with the information classification scheme adopted by the organization.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review labelling of information at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that labelling of information is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.objective: Information transfer rules, procedures, or agreements should be in place for all types of transfer facilities within the organization and between the organization and other parties.

controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information transfer at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information transfer is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.objective: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets should be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.
controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets should be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review access control at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that access control is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Identity Management
controls.objective: The full life cycle of identities should be managed.
controls.description: The full life cycle of identities should be managed.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review identity management at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that identity management is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.objective: Allocation and management of authentication information should be controlled by a management process, including advising personnel on the appropriate handling of authentication information.
controls.description: Allocation and management of authentication information should be controlled by a management process, including advising personnel on the appropriate handling of authentication information.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review authentication information at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that authentication information is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.objective: Access rights to information and other associated assets should be provisioned, reviewed, modified and removed in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on and rules for access control.
controls.description: Access rights to information and other associated assets should be provisioned, reviewed, modified and removed in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on and rules for access control.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review access rights at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that access rights is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships

controls.description: Processes and procedures should be defined and implemented to manage the information security risks associated with the use of supplier’s products or services.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information security in supplier relationships at planned intervals.

controls.objective: Relevant information security requirements should be established and agreed with each supplier based on the type of supplier relationship.
controls.description: Relevant information security requirements should be established and agreed with each supplier based on the type of supplier relationship.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review addressing information security within supplier agreements at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that addressing information security within supplier agreements is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain

controls.description: Processes and procedures should be defined and implemented to manage the information security risks associated with the ICT products and services supply chain.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review managing information security in the ict supply chain at planned intervals.

controls.title: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services

controls.title: Information security for use of cloud services

controls.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services should be established in accordance with the organization’s information security requirements.

controls.title: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.objective: The organization should plan and prepare for managing information security incidents by defining, establishing and communicating information security incident management processes, roles and responsibilities
controls.description: The organization should plan and prepare for managing information security incidents by defining, establishing and communicating information security incident management processes, roles and responsibilities

controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that collection of evidence is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information security during disruption at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information security during disruption is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review ict readiness for business continuity at planned intervals.

controls.title: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements

controls.description: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the organization’s approach to meet these requirements should be identified, documented and kept up to date.

controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that intellectual property rights is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Protection of records

controls.description: Records should be protected from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorized access and unauthorized release.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review protection of records at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that protection of records is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.description: The organization should identify and meet the requirements regarding the preservation of privacy and protection of PII according to applicable laws and regulations and contractual requirements.

controls.title: Independent review of information security
controls.objective: The organization’s approach to managing information security and its implementation including people, processes and technologies should be reviewed independently at planned intervals, or when significant changes occur.
controls.description: The organization’s approach to managing information security and its implementation including people, processes and technologies should be reviewed independently at planned intervals, or when significant changes occur.

controls.title: Screening
controls.objective: Background verification checks on all candidates to become personnel should be carried out prior to joining the organization and on an ongoing basis taking into consideration applicable laws, regulations and ethics and be proportional to the business requirements, the classification of the information to be accessed and the perceived risks.
controls.description: Background verification checks on all candidates to become personnel should be carried out prior to joining the organization and on an ongoing basis taking into consideration applicable laws, regulations and ethics and be proportional to the business requirements, the classification of the information to be accessed and the perceived risks.

controls.title: Information security awareness, education and training

controls.description: Personnel of the organization and relevant interested parties should receive appropriate information security awareness, education and training and regular updates of the organization's information security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures, as relevant for their job function.

controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review disciplinary process at planned intervals.

controls.description: Information security responsibilities and duties that remain valid after termination or change of employment should be defined, enforced and communicated to relevant personnel and other interested parties.

controls.title: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements

controls.description: Confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements reflecting the organization’s needs for the protection of information should be identified, documented, regularly reviewed and signed by personnel and other relevant interested parties.

controls.objective: Physical security for offices, rooms and facilities should be designed and implemented.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.objective: Access to information and other associated assets should be restricted in accordance with the established topic-specific policy on access control.
controls.description: Access to information and other associated assets should be restricted in accordance with the established topic-specific policy on access control.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information access restriction at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information access restriction is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.objective: Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries should be appropriately managed.
controls.description: Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries should be appropriately managed.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review access to source code at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that access to source code is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.objective: Secure authentication technologies and procedures should be implemented based on information access restrictions and the topic-specific policy on access control.
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures should be implemented based on information access restrictions and the topic-specific policy on access control.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review secure authentication at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that secure authentication is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Capacity management
controls.objective: The use of resources should be monitored and adjusted in line with current and expected capacity requirements.
controls.description: The use of resources should be monitored and adjusted in line with current and expected capacity requirements.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review capacity management at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that capacity management is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Protection against malware
controls.objective: Protection against malware should be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.
controls.description: Protection against malware should be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review protection against malware at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that protection against malware is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.objective: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use should be obtained, the organization’s exposure to such vulnerabilities should be evaluated and appropriate measures should be taken.
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use should be obtained, the organization’s exposure to such vulnerabilities should be evaluated and appropriate measures should be taken.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review management of technical vulnerabilities at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that management of technical vulnerabilities is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.objective: Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks should be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.
controls.description: Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks should be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review configuration management at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that configuration management is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Information deletion
controls.objective: Information stored in information systems, devices or in any other storage media should be deleted when no longer required.
controls.description: Information stored in information systems, devices or in any other storage media should be deleted when no longer required.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information deletion at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information deletion is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Data masking
controls.objective: Data masking should be used in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on access control and other related topic-specific policies, and business requirements, taking applicable legislation into consideration.
controls.description: Data masking should be used in accordance with the organization’s topic-specific policy on access control and other related topic-specific policies, and business requirements, taking applicable legislation into consideration.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review data masking at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that data masking is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.objective: Data leakage prevention measures should be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.
controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures should be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review data leakage prevention at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that data leakage prevention is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Information backup
controls.objective: Backup copies of information, software and systems should be maintained and regularly tested in accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup.
controls.description: Backup copies of information, software and systems should be maintained and regularly tested in accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review information backup at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that information backup is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Redundancy of information processing facilities
controls.objective: Information processing facilities should be implemented with redundancy sufficient to meet availability requirements.
controls.description: Information processing facilities should be implemented with redundancy sufficient to meet availability requirements.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review redundancy of information processing facilities at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Redundancy of information processing facilities evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that redundancy of information processing facilities is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Logging
controls.objective: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events should be produced, stored, protected and analysed.
controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events should be produced, stored, protected and analysed.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review logging at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that logging is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.objective: Networks, systems and applications should be monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate actions taken to evaluate potential information security incidents.
controls.description: Networks, systems and applications should be monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate actions taken to evaluate potential information security incidents.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review monitoring activities at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that monitoring activities is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Clock synchronization
controls.objective: The clocks of information processing systems used by the organization should be synchronized to approved time sources.
controls.description: The clocks of information processing systems used by the organization should be synchronized to approved time sources.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review clock synchronization at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that clock synchronization is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Use of privileged utility programs
controls.objective: The use of utility programs that can be capable of overriding system and application controls should be restricted and tightly controlled.
controls.description: The use of utility programs that can be capable of overriding system and application controls should be restricted and tightly controlled.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review use of privileged utility programs at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Use of privileged utility programs evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that use of privileged utility programs is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Installation of software on operational systems
controls.objective: Procedures and measures should be implemented to securely manage software installation on operational systems.
controls.description: Procedures and measures should be implemented to securely manage software installation on operational systems.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review installation of software on operational systems at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Installation of software on operational systems evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that installation of software on operational systems is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.objective: Networks and network devices should be secured, managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.
controls.description: Networks and network devices should be secured, managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review networks security at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that networks security is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Security of network services
controls.objective: Security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services should be identified, implemented and monitored.
controls.description: Security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services should be identified, implemented and monitored.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review security of network services at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that security of network services is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Segregation of networks
controls.objective: Groups of information services, users and information systems should be segregated in the organization’s networks.
controls.description: Groups of information services, users and information systems should be segregated in the organization’s networks.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review segregation of networks at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that segregation of networks is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.objective: Access to external websites should be managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.
controls.description: Access to external websites should be managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review web filtering at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that web filtering is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.objective: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, should be defined and implemented.
controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, should be defined and implemented.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review use of cryptography at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that use of cryptography is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Secure development life cycle
controls.objective: Rules for the secure development of software and systems should be established and applied.
controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems should be established and applied.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review secure development life cycle at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that secure development life cycle is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.objective: Information security requirements should be identified, specified and approved when developing or acquiring applications.
controls.description: Information security requirements should be identified, specified and approved when developing or acquiring applications.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review application security requirements at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that application security requirements is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.objective: Principles for engineering secure systems should be established, documented, maintained and applied to any information system development activities.
controls.description: Principles for engineering secure systems should be established, documented, maintained and applied to any information system development activities.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review secure system architecture and engineering principles at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Secure system architecture and engineering principles evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that secure system architecture and engineering principles is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.objective: Secure coding principles should be applied to software development.
controls.description: Secure coding principles should be applied to software development.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review secure coding at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that secure coding is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.objective: Security testing processes should be defined and implemented in the development life cycle.
controls.description: Security testing processes should be defined and implemented in the development life cycle.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review security testing in development and acceptance at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Security testing in development and acceptance evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that security testing in development and acceptance is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Outsourced development
controls.objective: The organization should direct, monitor and review the activities related to outsourced system development.
controls.description: The organization should direct, monitor and review the activities related to outsourced system development.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review outsourced development at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that outsourced development is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.objective: Development, testing and production environments should be separated and secured.
controls.description: Development, testing and production environments should be separated and secured.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review separation of development, test and production environments at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Separation of development, test and production environments evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that separation of development, test and production environments is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Change management
controls.objective: Changes to information processing facilities and information systems should be subject to change management procedures.
controls.description: Changes to information processing facilities and information systems should be subject to change management procedures.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review change management at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that change management is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Test information
controls.objective: Test information should be appropriately selected, protected and managed.
controls.description: Test information should be appropriately selected, protected and managed.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review test information at planned intervals.
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that test information is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.

controls.title: Protection of information systems during audit testing
controls.objective: Audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems should be planned and agreed between the tester and appropriate management.
controls.description: Audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems should be planned and agreed between the tester and appropriate management.
controls.guidance: Define ownership, document the expected process, retain evidence, and review protection of information systems during audit testing at planned intervals.
requiredEvidence: Protection of information systems during audit testing evidence
controls.aiGuidance: Confirm that protection of information systems during audit testing is documented, implemented, assigned to an owner, and supported by current evidence.
